nasb.text: When a man’s ways are pleasing to the Lord, He makes even his enemies to be at peace with him.

esv.text: When a man’s ways please the Lord, he makes even his enemies to be at peace with him.

cnv.text: 人所行的，若是蒙耶和華喜悅， 耶和華也使他的仇敵與他和好。

ccb.text: 人所行的若蒙耶和华喜悦， 耶和华必使仇敌与他和好。

csbs.text: 人的道路蒙耶和华喜悦时， 耶和华也使他的仇敌与他和好。
